name: Crinkles [Diaper Fairy]
description:
The Crinkly Crinkle of Crinkles Crinkling. If that statement doesn’t make any sense, you’re just not that kind of an intellectual.

Be aware, this is for the naughty ones that think this kind of stuff is enjoyable for some reason. Because you kids just don’t know any better, probably.
